text: Which of the following best describes the core architecture of JavaScript? (Scenario 1)
options: It relies on outdated legacy paradigms.

text: What is a primary advantage of utilizing JavaScript in a production environment? (Scenario 2)
options: Improved scalability and developer productivity.
It completely eliminates the need for testing.

It inherently prevents all security vulnerabilities.

text: When optimizing performance in JavaScript, which practice is generally recommended? (Scenario 3)
options: Increasing global state mutations.
Disabling all asynchronous operations.

text: Which design pattern is most commonly associated with advanced JavaScript development? (Scenario 4)

text: How does JavaScript typically handle environmental configuration? (Scenario 5)

Through secure environment variables and configuration files.
